RUNESMITH2-AETUS_RUNE.smartDescription:
[gold]Passive:[/gold] At the start of turn, gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
[gold]Break:[/gold] Gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(2)}.
RUNESMITH2-AETUS_RUNE.title: Aetus
RUNESMITH2-ALBUS_RUNE.description:
Rune: Gives [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Charge[/gold] and [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Potency[/gold] to ALL non-Albus Runes.
[color=gray][font_size=16]Does not trigger if you have no non-Albus Runes.[/font_size][/color]
RUNESMITH2-ALBUS_RUNE.smartDescription:
[gold]Passive:[/gold] At the end of turn, give [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Charge[/gold] and [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Potency[/gold] to ALL non-Albus Runes.
[color=gray][font_size=16]Does not trigger if you have no non-Albus Runes.[/font_size][/color]
[gold]Break:[/gold] Give [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Charges[/gold] and [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Potency[/gold] to ALL Runes.
RUNESMITH2-ALBUS_RUNE.title: Albus
RUNESMITH2-EMPTY_SLOT.description: Rune can be [gold]Crafted[/gold] into this slot. You can have no more than [blue]7[/blue] Runes.
RUNESMITH2-EMPTY_SLOT.title: Rune Slot
RUNESMITH2-FLAMMA_RUNE.description: Rune: Deals damage to random enemies.
RUNESMITH2-FLAMMA_RUNE.smartDescription:
[gold]Passive:[/gold] At the end of turn, deal [blue]{Passive}[/blue] damage to a random enemy.
[gold]Break:[/gold] Deal [blue]{Break}[/blue] damage to a random enemy.
RUNESMITH2-FLAMMA_RUNE.title: Flamma
RUNESMITH2-FLUMEN_RUNE.smartDescription:
[gold]Passive:[/gold] At the start of turn, draw [blue]1[/blue] card.
[gold]Break:[/gold] Draw [blue]2[/blue] cards.
RUNESMITH2-FLUMEN_RUNE.title: Flumen
RUNESMITH2-FULGOR_RUNE.description: Rune: Deals damage to random enemies twice.
RUNESMITH2-FULGOR_RUNE.smartDescription:
[gold]Passive:[/gold] At the end of turn, deal [blue]{Passive}[/blue] damage to a random enemy twice.
[gold]Break:[/gold] Deal [blue]{Break}[/blue] damage to a random enemy [blue]4[/blue] times.
RUNESMITH2-FULGOR_RUNE.title: Fulgor
RUNESMITH2-GLACIES_RUNE.smartDescription:
[gold]Passive:[/gold] At the end of turn, apply [blue]{CalculatedPassive}[/blue] [gold]Ice-Cold[/gold] to ALL enemies.
[gold]Break:[/gold] Apply [blue]{CalculatedBreak}[/blue] [gold]Ice-Cold[/gold] to ALL enemies.
RUNESMITH2-GLACIES_RUNE.title: Glacies
RUNESMITH2-INCENDIUM_RUNE.description: Rune: Deals damage to ALL enemies.
RUNESMITH2-INCENDIUM_RUNE.smartDescripti:
[gold]Passive:[/gold] At the end of turn, deal [blue]{Passive}[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.
[gold]Break:[/gold] Deal [blue]{Break}[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.
RUNESMITH2-INCENDIUM_RUNE.title: Incendium
RUNESMITH2-MAGMA_RUNE.description: Rune: Deals damage to random enemies and gains half [gold]Block[/gold].
RUNESMITH2-MAGMA_RUNE.smartDescription:
[gold]Passive:[/gold] At the end of turn, deal [blue]{Passive}[/blue] damage to a random enemy and gain [blue]{CalculatedPassive}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Break:[/gold] Deal [blue]{Break}[/blue] damage to a random enemy and gain [blue]{CalculatedBreak}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
RUNESMITH2-MAGMA_RUNE.title: Magma
RUNESMITH2-MORBUS_RUNE.description: Rune: Applies [gold]Weak[/gold] and [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to ALL enemies.
RUNESMITH2-MORBUS_RUNE.smartDescription:
[gold]Passive:[/gold] At the start of turn, apply [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Weak[/gold] and [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to ALL enemies.
[gold]Break:[/gold] Apply [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Weak[/gold] and [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to ALL enemies.
RUNESMITH2-MORBUS_RUNE.title: Morbus
RUNESMITH2-MUNDUS_RUNE.smartDescription:
Rune: Does nothing.
[color=gray][font_size=16]Perhaps the stored Charge and Potency could be used for something...[/font_size][/color]
RUNESMITH2-MUNDUS_RUNE.title: Mundus
RUNESMITH2-ORIGO_RUNE.description: Rune: Adds a random card to your hand. It's free to play for the turn.
RUNESMITH2-ORIGO_RUNE.smartDescription:
[gold]Passive:[/gold] At the start of turn, add a random {IfUpgraded:upgraded |}card to your hand. It's free to play this turn.
[gold]Break:[/gold] Add [blue]2[/blue] random {IfUpgraded:upgraded |}cards to your hand. They're free to play this turn.
RUNESMITH2-ORIGO_RUNE.title: Origo
RUNESMITH2-SAXUM_RUNE.smartDescription:
[gold]Passive[/gold]: At the end of turn, gain [blue]{Passive}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Break[/gold]: Gain [blue]{Break}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
RUNESMITH2-SAXUM_RUNE.title: Saxum
RUNESMITH2-VULCANUS_RUNE.description: Rune: Deals damage to ALL enemies and gain [gold]Block[/gold].
RUNESMITH2-VULCANUS_RUNE.smartDescriptio:
[gold]Passive:[/gold] At the end of turn, deal [blue]{Passive}[/blue] damage to ALL enemies and gain [blue]{Passive}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Break:[/gold] Deal [blue]{Break}[/blue] damage to ALL enemies and gain [blue]{Break}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
RUNESMITH2-VULCANUS_RUNE.title: Vulcanus
